dimensions.label: Recall precision
dimensions.description: Scores how much of the surfaced memory context is relevant to the scenario query.

dimensions.label: Recall relevance
dimensions.description: Scores whether the expected memory facts are present in the retrieved context.

dimensions.label: Behavioral influence readiness
dimensions.description: Scores whether the model received the needed memory evidence with enough precision to influence behavior. This is measurement-only; runtime does not infer behavior.

dimensions.label: Promotion quality
dimensions.description: Scores whether promoted memory candidates remain relevant and recallable after consolidation.

dimensions.label: Low-noise recall
dimensions.description: Scores suppression of irrelevant or stale memory in the surfaced context.
